programmes.show_description: As Benson teams up with the FBI on an unsolved case, Fin and Velasco investigate a flash mob robbery that lead to a sexual assault.
NCIS investigates the fatal poisoning of one of Kasie's forensic scientists. McGee is questioned by the Pentagon regarding the contents of his book.
Shaw and Riley discover a shocking motive after a young man is pushed in front of a train. In court, Price must persuade Baxter to testify about the misuse of legislation he wrote.
A man weaves a stolen motorbike through traffic at high speeds as he tries to evade police. Deputies examine the aftermath of a violent domestic argument.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
While stopping at a diner for coffee, Gibbs finds himself in grave danger, prompting him to think about his past and the choices he made.
Secrets: Crime drama. When a Navy captain is found dead with a costume under his uniform, NCIS uncovers a secret society of real-life super heroes and must track down the villain.
The death of a Navy psychologist working on an operation to undermine enemy scientists leads Gibbs to play mind games with the shrink in charge of 'Psy-ops'.
Crime drama. The massacre of a group of prep school students is linked to an Afghan warlord.
Crime drama. A recently paroled criminal dies after being hit by a car and detectives believe his former therapist had a hand in the murder.
Crime drama. A wealthy businessman is murdered and suspicion falls on the man who was having an affair with his wife.
Age Of Innocence: Crime drama. A car bomb kills a man who was fighting to terminate the life of his comatose wife. Fontana and Green investigate a host of pro-life campaigners (4/22).
Crime drama. Fontana and Green probe the murder of an undercover journalist who was investigating a notorious Latino gang (5/22).
Birthright: Crime drama. The death of a teenage girl in custody is linked to an illegal contraceptive implant, which was fitted without the girl's knowledge (6/22).
A petty officer gunned down in a billionaire's Ferrari leads the NCIS team to uncover an unexpected link to Gibbs.
When a lieutenant who has just returned from the Middle East is found dead, the NCIS team wants to interrogate the victim's friend.
Gibbs continues to work with Captain Wescott while he retraces his steps in order to help the team track down a terrorist.
Frank investigates when an undercover officer accuses a fellow cop of police brutality. Danny and Baez investigate the murder of a famous photographer recently accused of assault.
Danny and Baez work with Texas Ranger Waylon Gates to track the Lone Star Killer. After Eddie's partner mistakenly shoots an undercover cop, Jamie is accused of poor supervision.
Drama series about an elite force investigating sex crimes. Benson and Stabler investigate the near-fatal beating of a psychiatrist, possibly by one of her patients.
Drama series. A suspect is charged with the rape and murder of an undercover federal agent, and as the trial approaches, Cabot receives death threats.
The SVU helps a man come to terms with being victimized; Benson tries to support a victim's family when tragedy strikes twice.
When Chief McGrath's daughter discloses a sexual assault, Benson must balance the intricacies of the investigation with McGrath's impulsive actions.
The brutal torture and murder of a young author leads the detectives to a series of suspects, including a slimy literary agent and a jaded older writer.
Police question the legitimacy of the name a driver gives them. Both husband and wife protect each other in a case of domestic violence.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
On a visit to Japan, Jessica meets up with one of her former students who is being forced into an arranged marriage. Jessica steps in to solve the murder when the groom is found dead.
While examining the murder of a chief petty officer with top secret clearance, the team find an international arms dealer.
Following a leak of classified information, the Secretary of the Navy partners NCIS with PsyOps to solve the mysterious case.
A case hits close to home when the lead suspect in the murder of a petty officer is Director Vance's brother-in-law.
Crime drama. An up-and-coming rap star is in the frame for the slaying of a music producer, and Southerlyn's misgivings about the case put her at odds with McCoy.
A series of patients die from the flu after being given a fake vaccine. Detectives trace the counterfeit medicine to an unscrupulous con man.
An outspoken TV host is gunned down in the street and suspects include a woman who recently sued him for sexual harassment.
House Of Cards: Crime drama. A mother is murdered and her five-day-old son goes missing. The trail leads to a traumatised woman who stole the baby and pretended it was her own (7/22).
New York Minute: American crime drama series. The fatal shooting of a truck driver leads Fontana and Green to uncover a people-smuggling ring (8/22).
Criminal Law: Crime drama. McCoy's life is in danger when a killer he helped convict orchestrates a bloody campaign of revenge from his jail cell (9/22).
Gone: American crime drama. The latest case sees the team conduct a desperate search for a kidnapped teenager whose abductors killed a navy officer.
American crime drama. Gibbs teams up with FBI Agent Fornell on a joint NCIS-FBI investigation after Fornell becomes the target of a shooting.
American crime drama. It's Christmas time and Tony DiNozzo can't decide if he'll be naughty or nice when his dad, Anthony DiNozzo Sr, comes to town for a visit.
Drama series about sex crime investigation. A doctor attempts to falsify a paternity test naming him as the father of an infant who was murdered shortly after birth.
Drama series. When a young boy is kidnapped by a schizophrenic man, Stabler and Huang uncover further crimes at an adult group home.
A cryptic message sends SVU on a new track to find Maddie. Benson tries to help a federal agent when the case hits too close to home. Capt. Curry tries to make amends with Fin.
